tracks.meaning: a thing that is accepted as true or as a basis for reasoning, without proof
an unconscious acceptance of ideas or beliefs without critical examination
a fact or point accepted as true for purposes of legal argument or court proceedings
a supposition or presupposition taken to be the basis for a plan, proposal, or decision
a proposition or statement accepted as a starting point for further reasoning or proof
the Christian festival celebrating the bodily taking up of the Virgin Mary into heaven
the act of taking or adopting something, such as a belief, attitude, or responsibility
something presumed to be true in a conversation or argument without being explicitly stated
a underlying presupposition about market conditions or financial circumstances in forecasting or planning
